goal_text: Become debt-free as soon as possible

tasks.title: Compute safe monthly extra
tasks.description: Use Budget Assistant; confirm a sustainable number.

tasks.title: Solve required extra for target months
tasks.description: Use the target timeline tool; align lifestyle if needed.

tasks.title: Negotiate APR/fees
tasks.description: Call issuers to request APR reduction; document results.

tasks.title: Build $500 starter buffer
tasks.description: Shield the plan from small surprises.

tasks.title: Weekly review & check-in
tasks.description: Log blockers; adjust extra modestly, not to zero.
